one_liner: Experimental utilitarian dashboard for amateur storm chasers — radar-green monospace UI, callsign-driven identity, dense live-data quadrants.
audience: ham radio operators with weather interest
site_goal: Provide a dense, dashboard-style hub where amateur storm chasers can monitor live doppler, file chase logs, review gear, coordinate spotter networks, and connect via callsign-based identity.

palette.warn: amber alert orange (#ffae28) — reserved for WATCH/WARNING + clickable affordances
palette.accent_cyan_magenta: used only for radar dBZ legend

visual_language.typography: IBM Plex Mono fallback chain (Menlo, Consolas, DejaVu Sans Mono, Courier)
visual_language.density: very high — multi-column grids, sidebars, ticker bars, mini-radars
motifs: ASCII rules and tabular pre-formatted blocks
1px borders, faux radar sweeps with conic gradient
PACKET STATUS bar persistent on every page
callsign tags (KC5-WHIRL style) as primary identity
amber WATCH/WARNING chips and field-tested badges
QSL-style card template on member profile

pages.layout_pattern: four-quadrant ops console (radar mosaic / SPC outlook tabs / chaser ping ticker / LSR rolling feed) + persistent packet status bar + readout strip of CAPE/SRH/EHI etc.
sections: live radar mosaic quadrant (CSS-rendered with sweep + echoes + chaser pins)
SPC outlook quadrant with D1/D2/D3 tabs (inline SVG CONUS)

pages.layout_pattern: filter rail + sortable log table with expandable rows revealing GPS track, hodograph SVG, and narrative
sections: filter rail (year, state/CWA, EF, storm mode, callsign)
expandable detail drawer with hodograph + GPS track

pages.layout_pattern: left category nav + center mini-card grid + right comparison cart (max 4, persisted in localStorage)
sections: item grid with spec mini-cards and SVG icons

pages.layout_pattern: pinned briefings + collapsible CWA accordion of forum boards + threaded discussion view with >-quoted ancestry + net-control rotation table
sections: CWA accordion list (OUN, DDC, AMA, FWD, ICT, OAX, GLD, UNR)

pages.layout_pattern: month grid with categorical risk shading (MRGL/SLGT/ENH/MOD/HIGH amber escalation), click-to-load side panel with hazard matrix + RSVPs + rendezvous + historic anniversaries strip + ICS export

filter chip rail + masonry of SVG-rendered supercell stand-ins on black with amber borders, each tile carrying EXIF strip, photographer callsign, and storm metadata; lightbox with radar overlay toggle
sections: filter chip rail (wall, inflow, mammatus, LP, HP, classic, tornado, lightning)
masonry grid with EXIF strip per tile

pages.layout_pattern: searchable callsign table + QSL-style printable card + rig schematic (top-down SVG) for highlighted operator
sections: roster table (callsign, optional name, CWA, vehicle, certs, last-on-net, miles YTD)

content_model_coverage.outlook day: calendar.html — day cells with JS-loaded side panel
content_model_coverage.member profile: roster.html — roster row + QSL card + rig schematic

interactions_implemented: live UTC clock + chaser count + last-strike counter (JS, every 1s)
gear comparison cart with localStorage persistence (max 4)
calendar day click → renders hazard matrix + RSVPs in side panel
gallery filter chips (all / wall / inflow / mammatus / LP / HP / classic / tornado / lightning)
SPC outlook tabs (D1/D2/D3) swap inline SVG groups
mobile_behavior: Quadrants stack into single column; packet status bar drops to UTC + chaser count + warn chips; tables become horizontally scrollable with sticky first column; masonry collapses 4→2→1 columns; lightbox becomes single column; nav wraps.
disclaimer_strategy: Every page footer contains an amber-bordered 'NOT AN OFFICIAL NWS PRODUCT' disclaimer plus contextual page-specific caveats. Nav bar always carries an amber pill repeating the disclaimer.

tech.stack: vanilla HTML + CSS + ES5 JS, no frameworks, no build, no external assets
tech.images: all visuals rendered as inline SVG or CSS (radar mosaic, SPC outlook, hodographs, supercell stand-ins, rig schematic, QSL card)
tech.fonts: system monospace stack; no remote font load
tech.state: localStorage for gear comparison cart; everything else stateless
